title: Mary 1:1 Prep Workflow Misrouting
summary: Customer reports that the 1:1 prep workflow for Mary is routing outputs to the wrong destination. Open ticket, still being investigated.

title: Web search results banner appearing in weekly workflows
summary: Customer reports an unexpected web search results banner appearing in the output of their weekly workflow. Open ticket, under investigation.

title: Workflow for Slack alert on HubSpot closed-won
summary: Customer requested a new workflow to post a Slack alert when a deal is marked closed-won in HubSpot. Resolved and closed.

title: Handoff Note Formatting Issue in Deal
summary: Customer reported formatting issues in handoff notes being written to HubSpot deal records. Issue was resolved and ticket closed.

title: Workflow field removal and concise prompts
summary: Customer requested removal of certain fields from an existing workflow and more concise prompt language. Awaiting internal action.

title: Automatic email sending after meetings
summary: Customer wants to automatically send a follow-up email after each meeting ends. Awaiting customer confirmation on requirements.

title: Transcript inclusion in HubSpot notes
summary: Customer requested that meeting transcripts be included when posting notes to HubSpot. Awaiting customer feedback on the updated workflow.

title: Automatic note capture from Calls to HubSpot
summary: Customer requested a new workflow to automatically capture meeting notes and push them to HubSpot after calls. Awaiting customer review.

title: Visibility issue: public workflows missing on web app
summary: Customer reports that public workflows are not visible in the web app. Awaiting confirmation from customer after initial troubleshooting.

title: Running public workflows on uploaded transcript
summary: Customer asked how to run public workflows against an uploaded (non-live) transcript. Awaiting customer response.

title: Meeting notes not updating HubSpot record
summary: Customer reported that post-meeting notes were not being written to the HubSpot record. Issue was identified and resolved; ticket closed.

title: HubSpot: Meeting Summary not uploading for Victoria Paquin
summary: Meeting summary workflow is not uploading notes to HubSpot for a specific user (Victoria Paquin). Logged as a bug; under investigation.

title: Ask Elephant Notetakers deprecation post-meeting
summary: Customer is asking about what happens to notetakers and workflows after the deprecation of Ask Elephant notetakers. Open, awaiting response.

title: Meeting attendee analytics and WMQS workflow
summary: Customer requested a workflow combining meeting attendee analytics with WMQS (win/loss metric) analysis. Awaiting customer clarification on requirements.

title: Inactive workflow run triggered on Web App
summary: Customer reported that an inactive (disabled) workflow was unexpectedly running on the web app. Issue was resolved and ticket closed.

title: Re-running public workflow for recorded meeting
summary: Customer asked how to manually re-run a public workflow against a specific recorded meeting. Awaiting customer confirmation.

title: Manager: Workflows menu access and edit permissions
summary: Customer requested that a manager-level user be given access to the workflows menu and editing permissions. Resolved and closed.

title: Pulse check workflow: outdated customer updates
summary: Customer reported that their pulse check workflow was pulling outdated customer information. Issue was identified and fixed; ticket closed.

title: Slack automation for post-call task checklists
summary: Customer requested a new Slack automation that generates and posts a task checklist after each call. Open ticket, awaiting build.

title: Automatic association of post-demo notes with deals, contacts, and companies
summary: Customer wanted demo meeting notes to automatically associate with the relevant HubSpot deal, contact, and company records. Workflow was built and closed.

title: Missing default public workflows on last call recording
summary: Customer reported that default public workflows did not appear on their latest call recording. Awaiting customer follow-up after troubleshooting.

title: Missing Public Workflows option in meeting
summary: Customer cannot find the Public Workflows tab/option within the meeting view. Awaiting customer response after initial guidance.

title: Recurring meeting not recorded error
summary: Customer reported that a recurring calendar meeting was not being recorded by the workflow bot. Issue was resolved and ticket closed.

title: Button links to Deal instead of Company in CS Handoff
summary: A button in the CS Handoff workflow was incorrectly linking to the HubSpot Deal record instead of the Company record. Fixed and closed.

title: HubSpot field update workflow issue
summary: Customer reported that a workflow designed to update HubSpot fields is not functioning correctly. Awaiting internal action to resolve.

title: Trigger cadence: monthly or bi-weekly
summary: Customer asked about adjusting a workflow trigger to run on a monthly or bi-weekly cadence instead of the current setting. Resolved and closed.

title: HubSpot Meeting Outcomes Not Updating in Workflow
summary: Meeting outcome fields in HubSpot were not being updated by the workflow after calls. Issue was identified and fixed; ticket closed.

title: Automation for Meeting-Issue Monitoring and Slack Posting
summary: Customer requested a new workflow to monitor meetings for specific issues and post alerts to a Slack channel. Built and closed.

title: Recurring issue observed by Alexis Smith
summary: A recurring workflow issue was flagged by internal team member Alexis Smith. Details are vague; awaiting internal follow-up.

title: Workflow-Hubspot sync: missing approvals and inputs
summary: Workflow-to-HubSpot sync was dropping required approvals and input fields. Issue was diagnosed and resolved; ticket closed.

title: Logging mismatch: Note entry vs. missing in HubSpot
summary: Customer reported a discrepancy where notes appear to be logged in AskElephant but are missing in HubSpot. Awaiting customer response.

title: Workflow discussion: improvements and setup
summary: Customer requested a discussion session to explore workflow improvements and new setup options. Awaiting customer scheduling.

title: Sales to delivery handover workflow adjustment
summary: Customer requested adjustments to the sales-to-delivery handover workflow to improve data passed during transitions. Adjusted and closed.

title: Churn Risk Messages Triggered on SDR Calls
summary: Churn risk alert workflow was incorrectly triggering on SDR prospecting calls instead of customer success calls. Trigger logic was fixed; ticket closed.

title: Differences Between Workflow Approaches for Auto-Conversation Creation
summary: Customer asked about the differences between workflow approaches for automatically creating conversations. Support explained options; resolved and closed.

title: Workflows > Add Workflow Action: Show step descriptions on hover
summary: Customer requested a UX improvement to show step descriptions on hover when adding a workflow action. Logged as feature request; closed.

title: Automation Instruction Reversion for Email Follow-Up
summary: Customer's email follow-up workflow instructions were reverting to a previous version after edits. Bug was identified and fixed; closed.

title: Access to follow-up email template
summary: Customer requested access to a follow-up email workflow template. Support is awaiting customer confirmation on role/permission changes.

title: Duplicate workflow support feature request
summary: Customer requested the ability to duplicate an existing workflow as a new feature. Logged and awaiting internal response.

title: Daily 4:30 PM Summary and Action Items Workflow
summary: Customer wants a workflow that generates a daily 4:30 PM summary of calls and action items. Awaiting customer confirmation on exact requirements.

title: Draft recap email trigger option
summary: Customer requested an option to trigger a draft recap email from within the workflow system. Logged as feature request and closed.

title: Meeting Follow-up Email Prompt Request
summary: Customer requested a prompt adjustment to their meeting follow-up email workflow. Awaiting customer review of the proposed changes.

title: Customer quotes pulled for account reps in workflow
summary: Customer requested a workflow that extracts and surfaces positive customer quotes for account reps. Built and closed.

title: Manual trigger for User Story workflow
summary: Customer wanted the User Story workflow to support manual triggering in addition to automatic runs. Adjusted and closed.

title: Solution Mapping Workflow Updates
summary: Customer requested updates to their solution mapping workflow to better capture and structure sales insights. Adjusted and closed.

title: Automation of Bot Participation in Calendar Meetings
summary: Customer wants to automate which calendar meetings the bot joins for recording. Awaiting customer response on configuration criteria.

title: Workflow assistance request
summary: Customer requested general assistance with building or modifying a workflow. Support provided guidance and closed the ticket.

title: Mark Workflow Session
summary: A workflow setup/review session was scheduled and conducted with the customer. Session completed and ticket closed.

title: Rename from workflow list
summary: Customer requested the ability to rename a workflow directly from the workflow list view. Logged as a feature request.

title: Access grants for workflows
summary: Customer requested that specific users be granted access to view or edit workflows. Awaiting customer confirmation on which users and access levels.

title: Opportunity research data template for scheduled calls
summary: Customer requested a complex meeting prep workflow that pulls opportunity research data from HubSpot and formats it into a template before scheduled calls. Built and closed.

title: Upsell Opportunity Notification Workflow
summary: Customer wanted a workflow that detects upsell signals in calls and sends a notification to Slack with deal context from HubSpot. Built and closed.

title: CRM: Auto-populate HubSpot deal properties from call data
summary: Customer requested a workflow to automatically extract deal properties from call transcripts and populate corresponding HubSpot fields. Awaiting internal action.

title: Team-specific workflow and folder organization
summary: Customer asked how to organize workflows by team and whether folder-based organization is supported. Awaiting customer response after guidance was provided.

title: Meeting Coordination for Follow-Up
summary: Customer requested a workflow to coordinate follow-up meeting scheduling after initial calls, including email drafts. Built and closed.

title: HubSpot Deal Owner Change in Workflow
summary: Customer needed the workflow to correctly assign the deal owner field in HubSpot when creating or updating deal records. Adjusted and closed.

title: Workflow for automatic deal stage transitions
summary: Customer wanted a workflow to detect signals from calls and automatically move deals to the next stage in HubSpot. Built and closed.

title: Pre-follow-up Note for Demo Follow-Up Strategy
summary: Customer requested a workflow to generate a pre-follow-up note summarizing demo strategy to inform the follow-up email. Built and closed.

title: Prioritized follow-up for closed/won deals in HubSpot
summary: Customer wanted a workflow to identify and surface prioritized follow-up actions for recently closed/won deals in HubSpot. Built and closed.

title: Workflow for Transcripts to Google Drive
summary: Customer requested a workflow to automatically save call transcripts to a specific Google Drive folder after each meeting. Built and closed.

title: Workflow visibility issue in instance
summary: Workflows were not visible in a specific instance/workspace for the customer. Visibility issue was resolved; ticket closed.

title: Repeated Public Workflows in left navigation
summary: Customer reported seeing duplicate public workflows in the left navigation panel; caused by a recording being processed twice due to an upstream provider outage. Resolved as a one-off event.

title: Paramifys coaching workflow output context error
summary: The Paramifys team's coaching workflow was outputting 'no context' errors due to multiple conflicting active workflow versions; support deactivated the outdated versions and fixed the enabled tools, resolving the issue.

title: Access for Cam Byrne to create workflows
summary: Customer requested workflow creation access for user Cam Byrne; support elevated Cam to manager role (with a note that this also enables meeting privacy settings), and access was granted.

title: Workflow Label vs. Workflow Name
summary: Customer proposed a product enhancement to support separate admin-facing workflow names and user-facing workflow labels for better organization. Acknowledged as feedback and closed.

title: Workflow side of prompt not firing
summary: A specific branch/side of a workflow prompt was producing blank output; support identified a bug, manually reran the workflow successfully, and filed a development ticket for investigation.

title: Workflow automation for contact updates and notes organization
summary: Customer requested multiple workflows: (1) update HubSpot employee count from cold call data, (2) populate a Sandler-methodology form into HubSpot company/contact notes, and (3) apply Sandler framework enhancement to meeting notes; support built all three and closed.

title: HubSpot deal: Prospect in Qualified Leads workflow
summary: Customer requested a workflow to automatically create a HubSpot deal in the Qualified Leads pipeline for prospect calls, including summary and action items as notes; support built it using the new Structured HubSpot Agent node and closed.

title: Workflow for syncing meddpicc fields to HubSpot
summary: Customer requested a workflow to extract MEDDPICC framework data from calls and sync it to specific HubSpot deal property fields. Built and closed.

title: Workflow for Competitor Mentions in Hubspot
summary: Customer requested workflows to detect competitor mentions (ocean data and firmographic data categories) from calls and update corresponding HubSpot fields; support built and iterated on prompt logic, currently live and in testing.

title: Workflow: Email/SMS Deal Details Not Running
summary: Customer reported that a workflow designed to send email/SMS with deal details was not executing. Issue was resolved and ticket closed.

title: Workflow Execution Issue for New Rep
summary: A workflow was not running properly for a newly onboarded sales rep. Access or configuration issue was resolved and ticket closed.

title: Consolidation of Meeting Notes Versions
summary: Customer wanted to consolidate multiple versions of meeting note workflows into a single unified workflow. Consolidated and closed.

title: Workflow construction guidance
summary: Customer requested guidance on how to construct a workflow from scratch. Support provided step-by-step instructions and closed the ticket.

title: Sales playbook fields update workflow
summary: Customer requested a workflow to auto-populate 13 MEDDPICC-based HubSpot sales playbook fields (champion, competition, decision criteria, etc.) after first-demo-complete meetings; customer provided field slugs but awaiting internal build.

title: Transcript processing failure for meeting notes
summary: Customer reported that a transcript failed to process, preventing meeting notes from being generated. Processing issue was resolved; ticket closed.

title: Weekly briefs containing internal meetings
summary: Customer reported that the weekly brief workflow was incorrectly including internal team meetings in the summary output. Filter logic was adjusted and ticket closed.

title: Automation/Workflow tab disappeared or moved after update
summary: Customer could not find the Automation/Workflow tab after a product update had moved or renamed it. Support provided navigation guidance and closed the ticket.

title: HubSpot Demo Notes Auto-Population Workflow Update
summary: Customer requested updates to an existing workflow that auto-populates demo meeting notes in HubSpot. Adjustments were made and ticket closed.

title: Modify Workflow
summary: Customer submitted a generic workflow modification request. Support made the requested changes and closed the ticket.

title: Fix broken workflow
summary: Customer reported a broken workflow that is not producing expected outputs. Ticket is currently on hold, likely pending additional investigation or dependencies.

title: Workflow Save Failure Bug
summary: Customer encountered a bug where saving a workflow was failing with an error. Bug was confirmed and fixed; ticket closed.

title: New Workflow - Ticket Request Form
summary: Customer requested a new workflow to generate and route a ticket request form based on call content. Built and closed.

title: Selena's Follow Up Email
summary: Customer requested a follow-up email workflow tailored for a specific rep (Selena). Workflow was built and closed.

title: Undo option for saved workflow edits
summary: Customer requested an undo/revert feature when editing and saving workflows to recover from accidental changes. Logged as feature request; awaiting internal response.

title: Meeting Notes Processing and CRM Updates for Project
summary: Customer requested a workflow to process meeting notes and push structured updates to HubSpot CRM records for a specific project. Built and closed.

title: Advanced workflow creation support
summary: Customer needed hands-on support for building advanced multi-step workflows. A setup session was conducted and ticket closed.

title: Role requirements for setting up automations
summary: Customer asked what role permissions are required to create and manage automations/workflows in AskElephant. Support clarified role requirements and closed the ticket.

title: Workflow for Slack channel post of positive customer comments
summary: Customer requested a new workflow to detect positive customer comments in calls and automatically post them to a designated Slack channel. Open ticket, awaiting build.

title: Sandbox Workspace: Push of Improved Workflow
summary: Customer requested that an improved version of a workflow be pushed from sandbox/testing to their production workspace. Completed and closed.

title: Call To-Do follow up
summary: Customer wanted a workflow to extract and track to-do items from call recordings for follow-up. Awaiting customer feedback.

title: Pre-call research workflow
summary: Customer requested a workflow to automatically compile research about prospects and accounts before scheduled calls. Built and closed.

title: Meeting prep emails for each scheduled meeting
summary: Customer wanted a workflow to automatically send a meeting prep email before each scheduled meeting, triggered from the calendar. Built and closed.

title: Workflow: rebuy transcript not recognized by system
summary: Customer reported that a transcript from a rebuy/renewal meeting was not being recognized or processed by the workflow system. Issue was diagnosed and resolved; ticket closed.

title: Workflow population issue in automations
summary: Customer reported that workflow fields or outputs were not being populated correctly within automations. Issue was identified and fixed; ticket closed.

title: ICP Scoring Workflow
summary: Customer (Spencer at Enzy) wanted a new workflow to trigger on HubSpot lead creation, pull web data to score the lead against their ICP criteria, and write the score back to HubSpot. Support acknowledged the request and moved to Slack to continue; ticket closed after discussion.

title: Slack meeting prep alerts not delivering
summary: User (Stan) was not receiving meeting prep notifications in Slack because they lacked owner permissions to configure the Slack integration. Support explained that only workspace owners can connect integrations and advised asking an admin to connect Slack before setting up the delivery step.

title: Help With Workflow: Monthly Retainer Customer Sentiments
summary: Customer (Micah at Vendilli Digital) requested a workflow to pull retainer clients from HubSpot, compare CRM context and recent meeting data to produce sentiment scores and executive summaries. The workflow was partially working but failing to match accounts to meetings reliably; support was still iterating on a solution at ticket close.

title: Privacy change scope for recurring meetings
summary: Customer (Veronika) asked whether marking a recurring meeting instance as private applies to the whole series — support confirmed it only affects that instance. Customer then requested a feature to apply privacy rules across an entire meeting chain for recurring leadership meetings, citing privacy risk; support logged it as a feature request.

title: Workflow Building Session
summary: Customer (Andrew at Leland) reported their follow-up email workflow wasn't running on a Zoom-imported call; the root cause was Zoom import not capturing all attendee emails, causing AskElephant to misclassify the meeting as internal. Support identified the bug (Zoom metadata limitation) and noted the workaround is to use bot recording instead.

title: Understanding one workflow
summary: Customer (Chris) reported their HubSpot deal-creation workflow wasn't creating new deals when expected; investigation revealed the LLM was incorrectly treating a closed deal as active. Support manually triggered the deal creation and helped customer understand workflow logic; customer self-diagnosed a separate case where no decision maker was on the call.

title: Automation outages: lost outputs and prevention
summary: Customer (George) reported all automations were silently disabled on Feb 5 with no alerts, resulting in a week of lost workflow outputs. Support traced the deactivation to a team member (Micah) who turned them off while making edits; support manually re-ran the missed workflow on all affected calls and re-activated workflows.

title: External meeting invitation and transcription workflow
summary: Customer (Weston) asked how to invite the AskElephant notetaker into external meetings and how to get a transcript from an uploaded recording that failed to process. Support provided instructions and the transcript eventually generated successfully on its own.

title: Automation not triggering on new deal records
summary: Customer reported a workflow wasn't firing on new deal records; turns out the customer had simply never activated the workflow. Customer self-discovered the issue and resolved it before support could investigate.

title: Slack-based customer quote workflow failing
summary: Customer (Kaden) reported a Slack customer-quote workflow was sporadically not sending. Support reviewed workflow runs and determined calls were correctly filtered out by a conditional in node 2 when they didn't meet criteria; workflow was functioning as designed.

title: Case Study Workflow
summary: Customer (Olivia at Bravo Team) requested a new blog post workflow (originally submitted as 'case study') to extract topics from engineer interview transcripts, accept keyword data, and write blog posts using their brand voice guide. Support built and activated the workflow.

title: Workflow change save requirement for test mode
summary: Customer (Veronika) discovered a UI bug where the Test button could be triggered without saving workflow changes if the user never clicked out of the node being edited, causing tests to run on stale config. Support confirmed it was a bug, filed it with dev, and it was subsequently fixed in a Linear ticket.

title: Workflows Not Running Automatically on One Account
summary: Customer (Cam) reported workflows weren't auto-running for one rep (Trenton) whose AskElephant account used a different email domain than his calendar events. Support added the secondary domain as a recognized internal domain and later updated Trenton's primary email to the correct domain to fully resolve the issue.

title: Workflow builder not making changes
summary: Customer reported the workflow AI builder stated it made changes but the workflow was actually unchanged. Support asked for workflow details but no further response came; ticket was likely resolved via follow-up communication.

title: EM CS automations not running for user call recordings
summary: Customer (Mitchell) reported a CS call-scoring automation wasn't running for a rep (Jocelyn) after she switched teams. Support found the workflow conditional was misclassifying the call as a follow-up rather than first onboarding call; support updated the prompt to better distinguish CS firsts from sales conversations and re-ran the workflow successfully.

title: Snapshot Interactive || Workflow Issue
summary: Customer (Mark at Snapshot Interactive) reported their weekly communication coaching summary workflow wasn't pulling data correctly. Support added missing variables to the loop prompt and confirmed the test email output was correct.

title: Engagement Workflows Not Auto-Executing (Manual Intervention Required)
summary: Customer (Matt) filed a formal bug report that multiple engagement-level workflows—including recap email and HubSpot deal workflows—failed to auto-execute after a meeting, requiring manual triggering for all of them. Support logged it with development for investigation.

title: Workflow returning unexpected results
summary: Customer (Veronika at Chili-Publish) reported the SPICED Coach workflow was incorrectly triggering the 'no open opportunity' email branch when an open HubSpot opportunity did exist. Support found a missing conditional and added it so RevOps only receives the alert when no opportunity is genuinely found.

title: Workflow: Emailing All Users and Conversation Link Inclusion
summary: Customer (Veronika) reported a workflow that emails all users had inconsistent output formatting—sometimes omitting a data table. Support identified a prompting ambiguity causing the LLM to occasionally skip the table for email formatting reasons, tightened the prompt to always mirror the chat output, and also added the conversation URL to the email per customer's request.

title: Deal information update from uploaded meeting notes
summary: Customer requested a workflow to parse uploaded meeting notes and update HubSpot deal fields automatically. Based on the title and state (closed), this appears to have been built and resolved.

title: CS sentiment workflow misclassifies client-facing calls
summary: Customer reported a CS sentiment workflow was misclassifying client-facing calls, likely due to an overly broad conditional. Based on the title and closed state, support resolved the classification issue.

title: Workflow Firing for Closed-Won Deals Issue
summary: Customer reported a workflow was incorrectly triggering on closed-won deals when it should not. Based on the title and closed state, support identified and fixed the deal-stage conditional.

title: Workflow run failure with no feedback
summary: Customer reported a workflow run failure that provided no error feedback or explanation in the UI. This is a UX/observability bug where failed runs don't surface actionable error messages; status is open as bug_reports.

title: 2 Workflows for my meeting + hubspot agent project
summary: Customer requested two new workflows to support a HubSpot agent project: one for meeting prep and one for post-call notes/CRM updates. Based on title and closed state, both workflows were built and delivered.

title: Issue in Tag Meeting action of workflows
summary: Customer reported an issue with the Tag Meeting action step in a workflow not functioning as expected. Based on the closed state, support resolved the tagging action issue.

title: Updated Workflow
summary: Customer requested an update to an existing workflow (minimal context in title). Based on the closed state, the workflow adjustment was completed.

title: Workflow assistance and questions in video
summary: Customer submitted workflow-related questions accompanied by a video walkthrough. Based on the closed state, support reviewed the video and answered the questions.

title: Team weekly brief timeout during run

title: Turn Prompt into Repeatable Workflow

title: Automatic email template location and editability

summary: Customer wanted to push workflow output data to a CRM via webhook. Based on the closed state, support helped configure the webhook action in the workflow to push data to the CRM.

title: Meeting prep fails after meeting is processed.
summary: Customer reported meeting prep failed to generate after meetings were processed (possibly a timing or ordering issue in the workflow). Based on the closed state, support resolved the trigger timing issue.

summary: Customer reported an ongoing issue with a Notion-related workflow that continued not working after a previous attempt to fix it. Based on the closed state, support resolved the issue on this follow-up attempt.

title: Workflow link and access inquiry
summary: Customer asked about workflow links and how to share or access a workflow. Based on the closed state, support provided the workflow URL or access instructions.

summary: Customer requested an update to the location or content of Sales-to-CS handoff instructions in a workflow. Based on the closed state, support updated the workflow prompt or action.

summary: Customer needed help debugging a workflow. Based on the closed state, support walked through the workflow logic and resolved the issue.

summary: Customer reported untitled chat sessions were being auto-generated and spamming the chat page, likely created by a runaway workflow trigger. Based on the closed state, support resolved the spurious chat creation issue.
